message:
fix(vdbe): replace 6 remaining register_subtypes.is_empty() with has_subtypes flag

Third-pass review found 6 register_subtypes.is_empty() calls that were
added by concurrent agents AFTER the V1.4 has_subtypes optimization.
These bypassed the bool flag and went directly to HashMap::is_empty(),
defeating the optimization on every register write through these paths.

Locations fixed:
- materialize_make_record_sideband (line 10377)
- set_reg_fast overflow path (line 10976)
- set_reg general path (lines 11000, 11048, 11069)
- column_to_reg_direct cached path (line 11186)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
